sections.name: listening
sections.description: Part 1 (10 items): Listen to a short dialogue and judge if the description is correct. Part 2 (10 items): Listen to a dialogue and choose the correct picture. Part 3 (10 items): Listen to a short conversation (3–4 turns) and answer a question. Part 4 (10 items): Listen to a monologue and answer questions about it.

sections.name: reading
sections.description: Part 1 (10 items): Choose the word that fits correctly in a sentence. Part 2 (10 items): Arrange words/phrases to form a correct sentence. Part 3 (10 items): Read short passages and answer multiple-choice questions.

sections.name: writing
sections.description: Part 1 (5 items): Fill in the pinyin for a character shown in context. Part 2 (5 items): Reorder words to form a correct sentence. Part 3 (5 items): Write the correct character based on the pinyin given.

scoring_notes: Each section scored 0–100. Total is sum of three sections. 180/300 required to pass. Writing section introduced at HSK 3.
